title: Druids & Dinosaurs
body:
![Druids and Dinosaurs title card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86bd01aebbc1726d4ecc740d35e0958a36c1f10d.png) Druids & Dinosaurs adds a plethora of mobs and blocks into the game. Harness the power of souls to create whisps, golems, and bring back ancient creatures of a legendary era! This mob is primarily for adding cute and lively creatures and blocks that have a miscellaneous utility and decorative uses. Make an ethical iron farm with Rustlings, bring back ancient mobs with the living Tuff Totem Pole, or make a cozy house made of Jade & Aloewood! Feel free to comment any suggestions or bug reports! Admiral_M_10K.......................Models, Textures

VoidArkana...............................Code, Animations

Coda1552..................................Code, Animations

Popopi..................................Textures for Skeleton Hart, Zombie Hart, Antler Block, Skeleton Villager, Beacon Bloom, Pottery (Trunk, Hart, Rebirth)

MOBS
Spoiler Rustling: "Ethical Iron Farm", Small stationary critter who rusts over time. This makes them sad and uncomfortable! Use sheers to trim this rust. This rust can be smelted into iron ingots! Rustmunchers: They defend the Rustlings and will sheer off the rust to keep their buddies clean Whisp: Born from candles and bottle o'souls. These lil buddies can be fed candles to throw their corresponding potions based on their candle colour.  Hart: A lil deer-like creature, feed them apples and carrots to breed them! You can ride them as valiant steeds to travel across the land. Every so often they walk up to any log to scrap off and drop antlers. Antlers can be used to tame wolves or make bonemeal! They spawn in plains and rarely forests. Jade Automaton: Golem protectors made from Jade and Wicker Idols. Summon and it will follow & defend you like a wolf. To make them stay still feed them a dandelion and to get them following again feed them a Jade Shard. They can gain more life by right clicking them with a bottle o'soul and they can be given a Jade Axe to deal more damage! Jade Elephant: A Golem like creature, built from 3 Blocks of Jade with an Elephant Tuff Totem and right clicking with a bottle o'soul. The jolly elephant turns stone into Jade. Crackle: Find these rare eggs in lush caves. Place their egg on a hay bale to hatch them! Over time they shed crackle egg shards that can be used to craft ornate eggs Tuff Totem Pole: Place a Block of Jade, Elephant Tuff Totem, Hart Tuff Totem, Bird Tuff Totem then right-click with a bottle o'soul! This majestic towering mob can be given an ornate egg to imbue with the spirit of an ancient mob to summon into the modern world. Hue Hog:  Rodent that waddles around and brushes their tail on any flowers to collect its dye colour. Use sheers on the tail to collect the dye! If you give  Gourd Raptor: Feed him melon slice for gold nugget, feed him a melon for a gold ingot! Very very rarely you can find them in the Egg Raptor: They'll pick up any nearby Crackle Egg Sherds on the ground and deposit them into nearby barrels 
ITEMS
Spoiler Wicker Idol: Allows the user to pick up any mob's soul to easily transport somewhere else 3 Ornate Eggs: made from Crackle Egg Shards of either Copper, Gold, Diamond!
BLOCKS
Spoiler Aloewood Tree block set Gold block set  Bounce Shroom: Will progressively bounce entity higher and higher up 4 times in a row! Block of Rust Jade Block set Craft by using Block of Jade in a Stonecutter Jade Ore (found in any jungles!) Tuff Totems! Craft by putting Tuff into a Stonecutter! Currently there's  Catacomb Bone Block, craft via Bone Block in a Stonecutter 1 New Pottery pattern!
